Package org.sonarsource.sonarlint.core

Class AbstractSonarLintEngine

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.sonarsource.sonarlint.core.AbstractSonarLintEngine
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    SonarLintEngine
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ConnectedSonarLintEngineImpl, StandaloneSonarLintEngineImpl
    public abstract class AbstractSonarLintEngine
extends Object
implements SonarLintEngine
